selected_important_turn.text: Same. Plus I am planning on keeping a fire long into the night. Eating alot of food also helps keep you warm while sleeping. Perhaps I could offer you some extra food in return for some extra firewood?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete trade proposal that moves the negotiation from information-exchange into bargaining. It shapes expectations about what trades are possible and signals willingness to trade goods for firewood — a key resource the opponent prioritizes.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The proposal is improvable because it offers food in exchange for firewood even though you later reveal you have easy access to water and (per your preferences) value firewood highly. Offering food may be costly or unattractive relative to offering water (which you can spare). The offer is underspecified (no quantities) and doesn't ask what the opponent needs most or how much firewood would satisfy them, leaving room for miscoordination and later rejection.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Offer something you can genuinely spare (e.g., water, given you have a filter/stream) or specify concrete quantities and ask the opponent what minimum firewood they need. Tie the concession to a clear, limited exchange (e.g., “I can give X water packs for Y extra logs”) and invite the opponent to state their acceptable tradepoint.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (more efficient, lower-cost trade if you offer a resource you can spare)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (clearer, more symmetric exchange reduces sense of being shortchanged)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (specific, realistic offers reduce ambiguity and rejection risk)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: slight_increase (demonstrates thoughtfulness and reduces future tension)

dialogue.text: Hello How are you? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello there I'm well. How about yourself?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm good. I'm excited for the camping trip. I have been planning this for a few weeks. I'm excited to get out into the woods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Oh great! I love getting out into nature.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Do you have any preferences in regards to the firewood, food, and water? I would like us both to get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I get really cold at night so I'd like to have extra firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Same. Plus I am planning on keeping a fire long into the night. Eating alot of food also helps keep you warm while sleeping. Perhaps I could offer you some extra food in return for some extra firewood?

dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
